name: Ballroom
hints: The ballroom has a large fireplace. HELP says to check it out.
GO FIREPLACE to enter it and find hidden items.
GO FIREPLACE to enter (room 15). Inside you will find the dusty idol and access to the chimney with the stuck sweep.
Enter the fireplace to find the dusty idol (clean it to make it glow). The chimney leads to the sweep who gives you a paper.
notes: Ballroom with the fireplace (enter it to reach room 15). The fireplace contains the dusty idol and access to the chimney. EAST returns to the chapel.
